name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring core Java 8 language knowledge, including OOP concepts, collections, exception handling and the Java 8 language features (lambdas, streams).

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Spring core, AOP, the IOC container and transaction management.

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation and transaction processing.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the software testing lifecycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

name: Selenium (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of the Selenium WebDriver API and automated web testing concepts.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the .NET Framework 4.5 including CLR, assemblies and core libraries.

name: C# (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures core C# language knowledge including OOP, LINQ, generics and exception handling.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures core Python language knowledge including data structures, OOP and standard library usage.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures core JavaScript language knowledge including closures, async programming and the DOM.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of HTML5 and CSS3 including layout, semantics and responsive design.

name: React (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of React fundamentals including components, hooks, state management and the virtual DOM.

name: Angular (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Angular fundamentals including components, services, dependency injection and RxJS.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Node.js runtime, asynchronous programming, npm and building REST APIs.

name: PHP (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures core PHP language knowledge including OOP, sessions and common web application patterns.

name: C++ (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures core C++ language knowledge including memory management, templates and OOP.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Agile principles, Scrum and Kanban practices used in iterative software delivery.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures conceptual knowledge of project management principles including scope, schedule, budget and risk management.

name: Marketing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures conceptual knowledge of marketing principles, market research, consumer behavior, brand management, sales management, channel management and advertisement management.

name: Human Resources (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge and understanding of basic HR management concepts including planning, training and development, performance appraisal, compensation management and organizational behavior.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of financial accounting principles including journal entries, financial statements and reconciliation.

name: Basic Computer Literacy (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures basic computer literacy including operating systems, file management and common office applications.

name: Data Entry (New)
description: Simulation-based test that measures speed and accuracy of data entry from source documents into a database format.

name: Administrative Professional - Short Form
description: A short assessment of administrative skills including checking, filing, business vocabulary and proofreading, relevant to office support roles.

name: Contact Center Customer Service +
description: A simulation that measures customer-service oriented behavior and situational judgment relevant to contact center and service roles.

name: Sales & Service Phone Solution
description: A combined ability, personality and simulation solution for phone-based sales and service roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r) measures 32 workplace personality characteristics that influence how a person prefers to behave at work, mapped to competency potential.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: The Motivation Questionnaire measures what energizes and motivates an individual at work across 18 motivational dimensions.

name: Workplace Personality Inventory (WPI)
description: A personality inventory measuring workplace-relevant traits used to predict typical performance and cultural fit.

name: Remote Work Questionnaire (RWQ)
description: A questionnaire measuring an individual's preferences and readiness for remote and distributed work arrangements.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: A broad, multi-domain assessment of general workplace skills spanning numerical, verbal and problem-solving content, used for global comparison across candidate pools.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: An interactive cognitive ability test measuring inductive reasoning: the ability to identify patterns and relationships in novel information.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: A cognitive ability test measuring deductive reasoning: the ability to draw logical conclusions from given premises.

name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: A cognitive ability test measuring the ability to interpret and reason with numerical data such as tables and charts.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: A cognitive ability test measuring the ability to evaluate and reason with written information.

name: Verify G+
description: A general cognitive ability test combining verbal, numerical and inductive reasoning into a single composite score of general mental ability.

name: Verify - Calculation
description: A cognitive ability test measuring mental arithmetic and calculation speed without the use of a calculator.

name: Verify - Reading Comprehension
description: A cognitive ability test measuring the ability to understand and draw accurate conclusions from written passages.

name: General Entry Level - Data Entry 7.0 Solution
description: A combined solution of ability and simulation content for entry-level data entry and clerical roles.

name: Ruby on Rails (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the Ruby on Rails framework including MVC structure, ActiveRecord and routing.

name: ASP.NET MVC (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the ASP.NET MVC framework including routing, controllers, views and model binding.

name: AWS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of core AWS services including compute, storage, networking and security fundamentals.

name: Docker (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of containerization concepts and the Docker toolchain.
